headline: Broadcom Leads Five IBD 50 Stocks Near Buy Points; Most Are AI Plays
summary: Broadcom leads five stocks to watch near buy points. Several companies serve AI data centers and their appetite for chips, power and more.

headline: Our Top 10 High Growth Dividend Stocks - May 2026
